dungeonOverview.name: The Forgotten Temple
dungeonOverview.overview: An ancient temple lost to time.
dungeonOverview.relation_to_larger_setting: It sits on the edge of the kingdom.
dungeonOverview.finding_the_dungeon: Follow the old road through the forest.
dungeonOverview.history: Built centuries ago by a forgotten civilization.
dungeonOverview.dominant_power: A lich named Malakar rules here.
dungeonOverview.secondary_power: A group of bandits hiding in the lower levels.
dungeonOverview.secondary_power_event: They found a secret cache of gold.
dungeonOverview.potential_solutions: Destroy the phylactery or seal the temple.
dungeonOverview.conclusion: The fate of the region hangs in the balance.

npcs.name: Brother Marcus
npcs.short_description: A wise old monk who guards the entrance.

contentArray.content: Dust swirls in the dim light.
The walls are covered in ancient frescoes.

dungeonOverview.name: The Lost Mines
dungeonOverview.relation_to_larger_setting: Once provided ore to the kingdom.
dungeonOverview.history: Closed after a cave-in 50 years ago.
dungeonOverview.dominant_power: A black dragon has claimed it.
